stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — owns github external softwareSystem (same service as ISourceControlLifecycle; second contract IPullRequestRail)
volatility: GitTarget's PR-merge-rail face — how a proposed change becomes a branch, a pull request, a gated review, and a merge to main, and how the only-the-App-may-merge backstop is provisioned. Distinct from GitHub-App-lifecycle volatility (ISourceControlLifecycle) and from CI dispatch (constructionPipelineAccess).

outbound.name: github
outbound.how: Same single outbound edge as ISourceControlLifecycle: architecture.dsl line 461/621. GitHub PRs over the App installation credential minted by ISourceControlLifecycle.getInstallationToken.

ops.signature: OpenBranch(ctx, repo RepoRef, branch BranchName, cred RepoCredential, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (BranchRef, error)
ops.stereotype: Write — cut the per-activity working branch from main
ops.note: Creates branch from current main tip. Flat topology: always branches from main, never from another working branch. Idempotent on (repo, branch): AlreadyExists → success (returns existing BranchRef). SHORT timeout (~30s), retryable on Transient, terminal on Auth/NotFound/ContractMisuse.

fields.name: Branch
fields.note: the per-activity branch name the Manager derives (provider-neutral)

fields.name: Branch
fields.note: opaque provider-neutral handle to the cut branch; existing BranchRef returned on AlreadyExists (success)

ops.signature: OpenPullRequest(ctx, repo RepoRef, spec PullRequestSpec, cred RepoCredential, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (PullRequestRef, error)
ops.stereotype: Write — propose the activity branch into main
ops.note: PR is the unit of review + the merge gate. Idempotent on (repo, head, base): AlreadyExists → success. spec.Base is main in the flat model. Change-request group labels ride in spec.Hints. SHORT timeout (~30s), retryable on Transient, terminal on Auth/NotFound/ContractMisuse.

fields.name: Spec
fields.note: PullRequestSpec{Head BranchName, Base BranchName, Title string, Body string, Hints []byte}; Base is 'main' in the flat git-forward model

fields.name: PR
fields.note: opaque provider-neutral handle to the open proposal; existing PullRequestRef returned on AlreadyExists (success)

ops.signature: GetPullRequestStatus(ctx, repo RepoRef, pr PullRequestRef, cred RepoCredential) → (PullRequestStatus, error)
ops.stereotype: Read — dumb reflection of CI-green + approvals
ops.note: Pure read; no caller-supplied key. Returns PullRequestStatus{CheckRollup, ApprovalCount, Mergeable}. This is the REFLECTION Manager feeds to interventionEngine.decideOnVariance — it is NOT the gate. Does not dispatch or poll constructionPipelineAccess. SHORT timeout (~15s), retryable on Transient.

ops.signature: PostReview(ctx, repo RepoRef, pr PullRequestRef, review ReviewSubmission, cred RepoCredential, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → error
ops.note: Relays the in-app human architecture approval as a real PR review (the architecture +1). Idempotent on (pr, reviewer, verdict). Manager calls this ONLY after the in-app architecture-approval gate. Does NOT merge; does NOT decide whether to merge (that is interventionEngine). SHORT timeout (~15s).

fields.name: Review
fields.note: ReviewSubmission{Verdict ReviewVerdict, Body string}; Verdict ∈ {ReviewApprove, ReviewRequestChanges, ReviewComment}

ops.signature: MergePullRequest(ctx, repo RepoRef, pr PullRequestRef, cred RepoCredential, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (MergeResult, error)
ops.note: Performs the merge; the when-to-merge authority is InterventionPolicy (interventionEngine.decideOnVariance). Manager calls this AFTER the Engine clears the gate. Merge performed as the App (the only identity branch protection permits). Idempotent on pr: AlreadyMerged → success. Conflict (non-fast-forward) → retryable-after-reload via interventionEngine. NotMergeable → terminal.

fields.name: PR
fields.note: an open, mergeable PR; Manager must have obtained an interventionEngine gate-cleared decision before calling

fields.name: Commit
fields.note: opaque resulting main-tip ref; presented, never parsed

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; Conflict (merge-time CAS) is retryable-after-reload; NotMergeable is terminal; AlreadyMerged maps to success

ops.signature: ConfigureBranchProtection(ctx, repo RepoRef, cred RepoCredential, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → error
ops.note: Provisions main branch protection: required status checks + ≥1 approval + App-only-merge restriction. Out-of-band direct pushes to main rejected with one exception: the aiarch App identity retains direct-push for aiarch-authored project-state commits (D-PA-R intra-ref CAS path). Desired-state PUT; naturally idempotent. Called at repo creation by projectManager.

fields.name: Repo
fields.note: a provisioned repo; aiarch must be authorized with administration:write permission

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; desired-state PUT is naturally idempotent; Auth/ContractMisuse terminal

dataContracts: PullRequestSpec { Head BranchName; Base BranchName; Title string; Body string; Hints []byte }
PullRequestStatus { CheckRollup CheckState; ApprovalCount int; Mergeable bool }
RepoRef and RepoCredential: referenced from ISourceControlLifecycle §3.2, not redefined
errorModel: fwra.Error kinds: Transient (Retryable=true), Auth (Retryable=false), NotFound (Retryable=false), AlreadyExists (mapped to SUCCESS inside seam), AlreadyMerged (mapped to SUCCESS), Conflict (Retryable=true AFTER Manager reloads + re-decides via interventionEngine — mergePullRequest only), NotMergeable (Retryable=false), ContractMisuse (Retryable=false).
idempotency: openBranch: idempotent on (repo, branch) — AlreadyExists→success. openPullRequest: idempotent on (repo, head, base) — AlreadyExists→success. postReview: idempotent on (pr, reviewer, verdict). mergePullRequest: idempotent on pr — AlreadyMerged→success. configureBranchProtection: desired-state PUT, naturally idempotent. getPullRequestStatus: pure read, no key. All write ops carry optional fwra.IdempotencyKey for traceability.

revisions.summary: Initial design: 6 ops (openBranch, openPullRequest, getPullRequestStatus, postReview, mergePullRequest, configureBranchProtection). Second contract IPullRequestRail on sourceControlAccess service. App C §6.2b WAIVED with rationale (6 cohesive ops). Senior review APPROVE-AND-FREEZE 2026-06-10.

Post-freeze editorial mayAmend: §2.6 configureBranchProtection post-condition clarified (App retains direct-push for aiarch-authored project-state commits; D-PA-R intra-ref CAS path). §6 mapping row gained the two GitHub realization mechanisms (ruleset bypass actor / classic bypass_pull_request_allowances). Editorial only — no op, type, error kind, idempotency rule, or caller changed.
